title: VoiceEvent
description: An event emitted by the Voice Director during synthesis. Consumed by the Presence Director (and any other observer). The Voice Director never knows or cares who is subscribed.

profile.description: Name of the voice profile that was synthesizing.

metadata.description: Event-specific data. Consumers MUST tolerate missing / unknown keys. Common keys include text_length, sample_rate, duration_s, byte_length, reason.
